phrases.intent_en: Ask where the train station is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la stazione di Santa Maria Novella?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah stah-TSYOH-neh dee SAN-tah mah-REE-ah noh-VEL-lah?
phrases.cultural_note: Florence's main station is named after the basilica right beside it and is the main transport hub for the city.

responses.english: Main exit, it's right here outside.
responses.phonetic: oo-SHEE-tah preen-chee-PAH-leh, eh PROH-pryoh kwee FWOH-ree.
responses.local: Uscita principale, è proprio qui fuori.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the basilica requires a ticket
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, la Basilica di Santa Maria Novella è a pagamento?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, lah bah-ZEE-lee-kah dee SAN-tah mah-REE-ah noh-VEL-lah eh ah pah-gah-MEN-toh?

responses.phonetic: see, TRAN-neh DOO-ran-teh leh foon-TSYOH-nee reh-lee-JOH-zeh.
responses.local: Sì, tranne durante le funzioni religiose.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to store luggage near the station
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un deposito bagagli vicino alla stazione?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon deh-POH-zee-toh bah-GAH-lyee vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh?

responses.english: Yes, inside the station, ground floor.
responses.phonetic: see, al-een-TER-noh DEL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh, PYAH-noh TER-rah.
responses.local: Sì, all'interno della stazione, piano terra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which tram goes to the airport

responses.english: Line T2, the stop is in front of the station.
responses.phonetic: lah LEE-neh-ah tee DOO-eh, lah fer-MAH-tah eh dah-VAN-tee AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh.
responses.local: La linea T2, la fermata è davanti alla stazione.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a good restaurant near the station
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un buon ristorante vicino alla stazione?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon bwohn rees-toh-RAN-teh vee-CHEE-noh AL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh?

responses.english: Yes, on Via della Scala, two minutes away.
responses.phonetic: see, een VEE-ah DEL-lah SKAH-lah, ah DOO-eh mee-NOO-tee.
responses.local: Sì, in Via della Scala, a due minuti.
